title: Meta testing StoryKit, an AI iPhone app that creates ‘personalized children’s stories’
excerpt: Meta has quietly released a new iPhone app that uses AI to create personalized children’s stories, complete with illustrations, narration,...
content_html:
Meta has quietly released a new iPhone app that uses AI to create personalized children’s stories, complete with illustrations, narration, and original music.

The app is called StoryKit: personalized stories. It’s seemingly an experimental app as it’s currently available through the App Store in Mexico but not the U.S.

The limited availability suggests Meta is testing the concept regionally before deciding whether to launch it more broadly.

StoryKit promises to generate a complete story from three choices.

Users create or photograph a character, choose a setting such as an enchanted forest or distant galaxy, and select a lesson involving values like kindness, courage, or empathy.

Meta says StoryKit can then produce the story in several formats:

  • Picture Book — swipe through illustrated pages with narration and a musical score
  • Audiobook — hands-free, screen-free listening for the car, bath time, or before sleep
  • Read aloud — the full text on your phone so you can be the storyteller
  • Printable PDF — a physical keepsake they can scribble on, sleep with, and show their friends

The experiment arrives as Meta continues to broaden its AI ambitions beyond a conventional chatbot. The company replaced its Llama models earlier this year with Muse Spark, the first model from Meta Superintelligence Labs.

Meta has since added Muse Spark-powered features to its standalone Meta AI app. Muse Spark powers features across WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Messenger, and Threads as well.

Not every synergy idea has landed well with users, though.

9to5Mac’s Take

StoryKit sounds like a perfectly reasonable app that would be well-received if it were from almost anyone but Meta.

content_html_zh:
Meta 悄然发布了一款新的 iPhone 应用程序，该应用程序使用人工智能创建个性化的儿童故事，并配有插图、旁白和原创音乐。

该应用程序称为 StoryKit：个性化故事。 它似乎是一个实验性应用程序，因为它目前可以通过墨西哥的 App Store 获得，但在美国则不然。

有限的可用性表明 Meta 正在区域性地测试这个概念，然后再决定是否更广泛地推出它。

StoryKit 承诺从三个选择中生成一个完整的故事。

用户创建或拍摄一个角色，选择一个场景，例如魔法森林或遥远的星系，并选择涉及善良、勇气或同理心等价值观的课程。

Meta 表示 StoryKit 可以以多种格式生成故事：

  • 图画书 — 滑动浏览带旁白和乐谱的插图页面
  • 有声读物 — 在车内、洗澡时或睡觉前免提、无屏幕聆听
  • 大声朗读——在手机上朗读全文，这样你就可以成为讲故事的人
  • 可打印的 PDF——他们可以在上面乱涂乱画、和他们一起睡觉以及向朋友展示的实体纪念品

随着 Meta 继续将其人工智能野心扩展到传统聊天机器人之外，这项实验也随之而来。 该公司今年早些时候用 Muse Spark 取代了 Llama 模型，这是 Meta Superintelligence Labs 的第一个模型。

此后，Meta 将 Muse Spark 支持的功能添加到其独立的 Meta AI 应用程序中。 Muse Spark 还支持 WhatsApp、Instagram、Facebook、Messenger 和 Threads 的功能。

不过，并非所有协同创意都能很好地受到用户欢迎。

9to5Mac 的观点

StoryKit 听起来像是一个非常合理的应用程序，如果它来自除了 Meta 之外的几乎任何人，它都会受到好评。

FTC：我们使用赚取收入的汽车联盟链接。 更多的。
